candidates.why: Direct short-term debt line; useful component where reported.

final_choice.row_label: Current portion of non-current loans from financial institutions and pension loans

variables.notes: Used the minimal non-lease financing components for current debt. Intentionally excluded 'Lease liability' and avoided 'Current maturities'/'Maturing Within 1 Year' because those appear supplemental/ambiguous and risk overlap or lease inclusion.
